title: A Pleasant Holiday Under the Sun
description: Christmas Eve. Adachi wears a China dress—a remnant of her student days—and waits for Shimamura to come home. A warm, tender moment of reunion.
content:
After I finished getting dressed—far too late to question it—I found myself wondering what this outfit was supposed to be.

It was Christmas, after all, I thought as I glanced at the table I'd prepared. Not a single detail was out of place. Christmas. A holy night. And here I was, tugging at the hem of the China dress. Every year, the slit on the side bothered me a little more. Sometimes I couldn't help but reflect on life—on how a moment of impulse from my student days had taken on such a solid form even now.

But then—

The sound of the doorbell I'd been waiting for melted those doubts away like snow.

My sun had come home.

'Ah—aiyaa, welcome back, Shimamura-saaan… Is that right?'

Trying to embody that thing we talked about before… what was it again? 'Being yourself'? Something like that. As I greeted her with that in mind, Shimamura paused for a beat—and then, as if brushing off all the winter cold that clung to her, her face lit up in a brilliant smile.

'Okay, okay—wonderful. Very in character.'

The warmth and round, gentle light radiating from her felt like it was slowly drawing closer, enveloping me.

And I let myself be swallowed by that light.

'Aha.'

A soft laugh slipped out of me before I knew it, imitating the Shimamura from a long time ago.
